/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/utils/encryption.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/services/openrouter_service.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/controllers/auth_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/controllers/openrouter_controller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ctrlpanel_backend.dir/src/controllers/config_controller.cpp.o -o ctrlpanel_backend  -ljsoncpp -lcurl -lssl -lcrypto -lpthread
